title: Fixture fix for js/ts deserialization (atomic with bank addition)
summary: ATOMIC commit: rewrote both javascript/deserialization_positive.js and typescript/deserialization_positive.ts to exercise a real Deserialize sink (node-serialize.unserialize(d) on a tainted req.query.d source) instead of eval(d) (which projects to CodeEval, not Deserialize). Concurrently added a single TYPESCRIPT_AST_SINKS entry mapping unserialize -> TaintSinkType::Deserialize.

bank_entry_added.rationale: node-serialize.unserialize is the canonical RCE-prone deserializer in JS (CVE-2017-5941). The ("serialize", "unserialize") member_pattern matches via the call-shape path in member_patterns_match (taint.rs:3866-3886) which splits the dotted call name on rfind('.') for shapes like serialize.unserialize(d). The ("", "node-serialize") raw fallback catches inline-require shapes like require('node-serialize').unserialize(d). The bare call_name ["unserialize"] also covers default-import shapes like import { unserialize } from 'node-serialize'.

atomicity_justification: Splitting fixture rewrite from bank addition would leave the test suite inconsistent: rewrite-then-bank-add intermediate commit has the fixture asserting vuln_type=deserialization but the engine has no matching sink, so javascript_deserialization_positive + typescript_deserialization_positive stay RED until the second commit. Bank-add-then-rewrite intermediate commit is harmless but wastes a commit on an unused entry. Single atomic commit achieves both transitions in lockstep.

vuln_migration_v1_red.remaining_red_disposition_note: 8 RED total. 5 are documented carry-forwards (1 ruby_command_injection_positive backtick-subshell precedent + 4 rust_* dispositions classified by M1). 3 (cpp/java/scala_deserialization_positive) are M2-surfaced nested-constructor var-extraction limitations — out of scope for M4, M5 will document.

tests.vuln_migration_v1_composite_red: 1/1 GREEN — composite_multi_pattern_string_literal_fp_returns_zero_findings remains GREEN (no FP regression from added Deserialize bank entry).

fp_fixture_verification.javascript_deserialization_string_litera: GREEN — fixture content (eval/res.send/etc inside string literals) does not mention 'unserialize' or 'node-serialize'; new bank entry has zero overlap.

validator_mandate_compliance.fixture_fix_atomic: PASS — single commit with all 3 file changes (2 fixture + 1 taint.rs).
validator_mandate_compliance.additive_bank_change_only: PASS — added one AstSinkPattern entry to TYPESCRIPT_AST_SINKS, no removals.
validator_mandate_compliance.m2_m3_m4_serial: PASS — M4 follows M3 (669b0f5) serially under single executor session.

stop_thresholds_met: ATOMIC: single commit. The 3 file changes ship together with NO intermediate commit.
staging_method: explicit add only — `git add` of the 5 listed paths
